description: Resolve DOI/PMID/PMCID/ISBN/arXiv/ISSN/ADS/WHO IRIS to citations, exports, retraction, OA, verify.
name: io.github.mlava/scholar-sidekick-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional first-party API key (ssk_) from https://scholar-sidekick.com/account. Raises rate limits and enables the verifier LLM screen; sent as Authorization: Bearer. Works anonymously without any key.
environmentVariables.name: SCHOLAR_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional RapidAPI key for paid/managed tiers; when set, calls route through the RapidAPI gateway. Get one at https://rapidapi.com/scholar-sidekick-scholar-sidekick-api/api/scholar-sidekick
environmentVariables.name: RAPIDAPI_KEY

title: Scholar Sidekick
